findings.title: Circular dependency (14 modules)
findings.description: Cycle: _exception_handler.py → _utils.py → applications.py → background.py → datastructures.py → formparsers.py → errors.py → exceptions.py → sessions.py → requests.py → responses.py → routing.py → types.py → websockets.py
findings.fix: Zirkuläre Abhängigkeit (14 Module): _exception_handler.py → _utils.py → applications.py → background.py → datastructures.py → formparsers.py → errors.py → exceptions.py → sessions.py → requests.py → responses.py → routing.py → types.py → websockets.py. Breche Zyklus durch Interface-Extraktion oder Dependency Inversion.

findings.title: Novel dependencies in starlette/
findings.description:
Recently introduced 4 package(s) not previously used in this module: datetime, hashlib, mimetypes, secrets
  - starlette\responses.py:3 imports 'hashlib'
  - starlette\responses.py:10 imports 'datetime'
  - starlette\responses.py:13 imports 'mimetypes'
  - starlette\responses.py:14 imports 'secrets'
findings.fix: Prüfe ob datetime, hashlib, mimetypes, secrets bewusst eingeführt wurde. Wenn ja, zur drift-Konfiguration unter allowed_imports hinzufügen. Wenn nicht, Abhängigkeit entfernen.
